text: Microsoft lays off 4,800 in companywide cuts - The Seattle Times

text: Judge says alleged D.C. pipe bomber Brian Cole Jr. isn't covered by Trump's Jan. 6 pardons - CBS News

text: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas - CNBC
